action_items.action: URGENT: Review and sign off GDCU-8893 Gambling.com Design System (Highest priority, Ciara Carroll) — moved to 'In Product' at 12:11 today. Was still 'In Progress' in the morning report. Ciara has shipped: 30+ components, 12+ elements, Orion git integration, all colour grades, type/fonts, 300+ icons, 200+ images, design.md/skill.md. This is now sitting on Mike's desk. Highest-priority item in the sprint — review before EOD.

NEW: GDCU-8546 Tinder Style Offer Match moved to 'In Product' at 13:04 today — AND Jessica Dordevic DM'd Mike at 13:50 asking: 'I think we could mention in the ticket where it redirects when they've seen all offers for devs just like you wrote in the Figma comment and thats it right? no need to create unnecessary different scenarios in the design?' Reply to Jess to confirm ticket scope, then review the design. Two things needed: DM reply + Jira review.

CARRIED: GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign (Ciara Carroll) — still Blocked/In Product, now 11 days with no resolution (since 2026-04-16). Updated at 11:00 today but still stuck. This is the longest-running unresolved blocker in the sprint. Escalate or make a concrete decision today.

CARRIED — NEW CONTEXT: GDCU-8792 Cloudflare Bot Management (Sanja Budic) — still Blocked/In QA. Chloe Christie commented 2026-04-23: 'Blocked until Victoria Dadson returns from leave.' Vic is the QA owner and is currently on leave. Check when Vic returns and decide whether to assign an alternative QA or hold. Stakeholders: David Mulero Pino, Eoin McCarthy, Tony Iannelli, Chloe Christie.

NEW: Review GDCU-8694 Create 500x290 Size for Image Carousel (Jessica Dordevic) — moved to 'In Product' at 08:51 today. Not in the morning report. Carousel image size confirmed as 500px width (Origins operational size) per discussion between Miguel, Chloe and Ciara in #gdc-product-design-pod on 2026-04-22. Mike's sign-off needed to progress to dev.

NEW: Review GDCU-8870 Investigate Performance Improvements for Page Timeouts (Nebojsa Stanic) — moved to 'In Product' at 10:28 today. Not in the morning report. Nebojsa has completed his investigation; Mike needs to review findings and confirm next steps or raise a follow-on implementation ticket.

Reply to Colin Brannigan in Group DM (Colin / Dean Ryan / David Mulero Pino / Mike) — Colin asked at 13:42 today: 'can i set a date that will update all charts on the page instead of having to do it on each chart?' David has been actively updating the analytics dashboard. Mike is in this thread and hasn't responded.

CARRIED: Review and sign off GDCU-8512 Always On Betting Tips Page (Miguel Migneco) — still In Product since 2026-04-23 12:06, no review yet (4 days). Mobile-first Betting Tips Hub with live tip cards, sport nav tabs, Matrix widget, and operator offers module. Stakeholders: Colin Brannigan, Dean Ryan, Dan Smullen, Chloe Christie.

Both questions from 2026-04-23, no update today.

NOTE: Novica Vukobratovic is off sick today — posted in #gdc-pod at 07:08: 'I am sick as well as my kid so I will be taking a day off.' GDCU-8840 (Instagram Headers Widget) still marked Done today. Check Novica's remaining sprint tasks for any knock-on capacity risk.

The ticket states 'UX ticket must be completed before this is actioned.' Create the UX pre-req ticket to formally unblock the build.
